SolderMaskExpContinuousModePrompt:
Enable continuous generation?
OK: keep clicking/box-selecting on the PCB. Cancel: generate once for the current selection only.
SolderMaskExpIframeOpenFailed: Could not open the setup window. Please retry or update JLCEDA.
SolderMaskExpNeedPcb: Open a PCB or footprint document before running this command.
SolderMaskExpSelectKindAfter: Forbidden regions become copper-layer region rules; solder-mask only keeps fills on solder-mask layers.
SolderMaskExpKindSolderMask: Solder mask only (fills on solder-mask layers)
SolderMaskExpInputBefore:
Expansion (single-side offset from pad outline)
Unit: ${1}
SolderMaskExpInputAfter:
Values are converted to PCB mils.
Recommended: <= ${1} mil.
SolderMaskExpTooLarge: Value is too large. Please enter <= ${1} mil.
SolderMaskExpApplyInteractiveBefore:
After applying, keep selecting in the PCB: click pads or box-select; selecting a component applies to all its pads.
Unit: ${1}
SolderMaskExpInteractiveHint: pad-expand-helper — continuous mode: click or box-select pads/components on the PCB canvas. Click Stop generation in the setup window, press Esc or right-click, or close the setup window to exit.
SolderMaskExpNoSolderMaskLayer: Pad layer does not map to top/bottom solder mask (e.g. inner-layer pad); skipped
SolderMaskExpNoShapeForSolderMask: Special pad stack produced no solder-mask side to draw; skipped
SolderMaskExpFinalizeRegionFailed: convert to forbidden region failed (solder-mask fill removed if possible)
iframeSetupKindHint: Forbidden regions become copper-layer region rules; solder-mask output keeps fills on solder-mask layers only.
iframeKindSolderMask: Solder mask only (fills on solder-mask layers)
iframeWidthSubhint: Values are converted to PCB mils before geometry.
